jobsplus.job.jobsplus.smith.name: Blacksmith
jobsplus.job.jobsplus.smith.description: The Blacksmith is a master of forging and armor. Use the Blacksmith's powerups to make your armor last longer!
jobsplus.job.jobsplus.hunter.name: Archer
jobsplus.job.jobsplus.hunter.description: The Archer is a master of marksmanship. Use the Archer's powerups to keep your bow in top shape!
jobsplus.job.jobsplus.alchemist.name: Cleric
jobsplus.job.jobsplus.alchemist.descript: The Cleric is a master of potions and brewing. Use the Cleric's powerups to make your potions even stronger!
jobsplus.powerup.jobsplus.smith.root.des: The Blacksmith is a master of forging and armor. Use the Blacksmith's powerups to make your armor last longer!
jobsplus.powerup.jobsplus.hunter.root.de: The Archer is a master of marksmanship. Use the Archer's powerups to keep your bow in top shape!
jobsplus.powerup.jobsplus.alchemist.root: The Cleric is a master of potions and brewing. Use the Cleric's powerups to make your potions even stronger!
jobsplus.job.jobsplus.warrior.name: Warrior
jobsplus.job.jobsplus.warrior.descriptio: The Warrior is a master of combat. Slay hostile mobs to earn XP!
jobsplus.job.jobsplus.rogue.name: Rogue
jobsplus.job.jobsplus.rogue.description: The Rogue is a cunning fighter. Slay hostile mobs and explore to earn XP!
jobsplus.job.jobsplus.beastmaster.name: Beastmaster
jobsplus.job.jobsplus.beastmaster.descri: The Beastmaster bonds with animals. Tame creatures to earn XP!
jobsplus.job.jobsplus.cook.name: Cook
jobsplus.job.jobsplus.cook.description: The Cook prepares fine meals. Craft and cook food to earn XP!
jobsplus.job.jobsplus.merchant.name: Merchant
jobsplus.job.jobsplus.merchant.descripti: The Merchant thrives on trade. Trade with villagers to earn XP!
jobsplus.job.jobsplus.rancher.name: Rancher
jobsplus.job.jobsplus.rancher.descriptio: The Rancher tends livestock. Breed and shear animals to earn XP!
jobsplus.job.jobsplus.explorer.name: Explorer
jobsplus.job.jobsplus.explorer.descripti: The Explorer ventures far and wide. Place blocks and swim to earn XP!
jobsplus.powerup.jobsplus.warrior.root.d: The Warrior is a master of combat. Slay hostile mobs to earn XP!
jobsplus.powerup.jobsplus.rogue.root.des: The Rogue is a cunning fighter. Slay hostile mobs and explore to earn XP!
jobsplus.powerup.jobsplus.beastmaster.ro: The Beastmaster bonds with animals. Tame creatures to earn XP!

jobsplus.powerup.jobsplus.hunter.bow_dur: 15% chance to save bow durability when shooting.
